folksonomy.description: Folksonomi gba awọn olumulo laaye lati ṣafikun awọn afi aṣa si awọn ọja. Ṣawakiri gbogbo awọn bọtini ti o wa ni isalẹ, wa awọn bọtini kan pato, tabi tẹ bọtini eyikeyi lati wo awọn ọja ti o lo.

datasources.title: Awọn orisun data

datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.

info.images: Ṣe agbejade awọn aworan ti o han gbangba ti ọja, awọn eroja, ati awọn ododo ijẹẹmu lati ṣe iranlọwọ fun awọn miiran lati ṣe idanimọ ọja naa.
info.basic_info: Pese awọn alaye akọkọ nipa ọja, gẹgẹbi opoiye, apoti, ati olupese.
info.languages: Ṣafikun awọn orukọ ọja ati awọn apejuwe ni awọn ede oriṣiriṣi lati jẹ ki ọja wa si awọn olumulo diẹ sii.
info.ingredients: Ṣe atokọ gbogbo awọn eroja ti o wa ninu ọja naa. Eyi ṣe iranlọwọ fun awọn olumulo pẹlu awọn nkan ti ara korira tabi awọn ayanfẹ ounjẹ.
info.nutrition: Tẹ awọn iye ijẹẹmu fun 100g/milimita bi a ṣe han lori apoti. Eyi ṣe iranlọwọ fun awọn olumulo ni afiwe awọn ọja.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Ni yiyan, ṣafikun asọye lati ṣapejuwe awọn ayipada rẹ tabi pese aaye afikun.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Iye yii ṣe iranlọwọ lati ṣe iṣiro iwọn ti ounjẹ kọọkan fun iwọn iṣẹ. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 60 g, 60g tabi 60G (yan akọkọ), 1000 milimita tabi 1L.
tooltips.ingredients_list: Pa ìtòlẹ́sẹẹsẹ àtilẹ̀wá mọ́. Fi ìpín ogorun hàn nígbà tí a bá sọ ọ́. Ya sọ́tọ̀ pẹ̀lú àmì ìdámọ̀ tàbí àmì ìdámọ̀ kí o sì lo àmì ìdámọ̀ fún àwọn èròjà èròjà kan.
tooltips.categories: Tọkasi nikan julọ pato ẹka. Awọn ẹka obi yoo ṣafikun laifọwọyi. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 'Sardines ninu epo olifi', 'Oje Orange lati idojukọ'.
tooltips.product_name: Orukọ ọja naa jẹ orukọ akọkọ ti a tẹ lori apoti. O le jẹ aami-iṣowo ti a forukọsilẹ. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 'Nesquik', 'Tomato ketchup'. Ma ṣe pẹlu ami iyasọtọ naa ni orukọ
tooltips.brand_name: Tẹ gbogbo awọn ami iyasọtọ ọja naa. Aami ami akọkọ, ni gbogbogbo ti o han gbangba lori idii iwaju, yẹ ki o wa ni titẹ sii ni akọkọ. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 'Nutella, 'Oreo, Mondelez'
tooltips.quantity: Daakọ iye itọkasi lori ọja naa ki o maṣe gbagbe awọn ẹya naa. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 230g, 6 (fun awọn ẹyin 6), 3 x 150g (fun ọja kan pẹlu awọn apoti 3, kọọkan ti 150g).
tooltips.labels: Eyikeyi abuda ti ọja ** eyiti o jẹ otitọ *** ati yatọ si awọn aaye miiran. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Ṣe ni Bẹljiọmu, ti a ṣe ni Brittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Wọle ile itaja ti o ti ra ọja naa. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Ṣafikun eyikeyi awọn itọkasi ti awọn ipilẹṣẹ ti o le rii lori apoti naa. O ko nilo aibalẹ nipa awọn ipilẹṣẹ ti o tọka taara ninu atokọ eroja. Fun apẹẹrẹ, 'Eran malu lati Argentina', 'Soy ko wa lati European Union'.
tooltips.traceability_code: Ni abala yii, o le tẹ awọn koodu sii ti o ni ibatan si awọn ami idii, awọn ami idanimọ tabi awọn ami ilera.
tooltips.countries: Awọn orilẹ-ede nibiti ọja wa lọpọlọpọ (kii ṣe pẹlu awọn ile itaja ti o ṣe amọja ni awọn ọja ajeji).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.no_languages_found: Ko si awọn ede ti a rii
edit.name: Orúkọ

packaging_component.weight_measured: Ìwọ̀n ẹyọ kan tí ó ṣofo (g)
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Tẹ iye awọn ohun elo apoti ti o ni apẹrẹ kanna ati ohun elo ti o wa ninu ọja naa sii.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Tẹ orukọ apẹrẹ ti a ṣe akojọ si ninu awọn ilana atunlo ti o ba wa, tabi yan apẹrẹ kan.
packaging_component.material_desc: Tẹ ohun èlò pàtó náà tí a bá lè pinnu rẹ̀ (a lè rí kódù ohun èlò inú onígun mẹ́ta kan lórí àwọn ẹ̀yà ìdìpọ̀), tàbí ohun èlò gbogbogbòò (fún àpẹẹrẹ ike tàbí irin) tí o kò bá dá ọ lójú.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Tẹ awọn ilana atunlo nikan ti wọn ba wa lori ọja naa.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Tẹ iwọn apapọ tabi iwọn apapọ sii ki o si tọka si iwọn naa (fun apẹẹrẹ g tabi milimita).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients

edit.legal_warning_title: Ma ṣe gbejade awọn aworan aladakọ
edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Ma ṣe gbejade awọn fọto ti o ko ni tabi ko ni awọn ẹtọ si. Ikojọpọ awọn aworan aladakọ laisi igbanilaaye jẹ arufin ati pe o le fa ki akọọlẹ rẹ duro.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Ṣe agbejade awọn fọto tirẹ nikan tabi awọn ti o ni igbanilaaye fojuhan lati lo.

landing.subtitle: Ifowosowopo, ọfẹ ati ṣiṣi data ti awọn ọja ounjẹ lati kakiri agbaye. Ṣawari, ṣawari, ati ṣe alabapin si akoyawo ounjẹ fun gbogbo eniyan.
landing.explore_products_desc: Ṣawakiri awọn miliọnu awọn ọja ounjẹ, wo awọn ododo ijẹẹmu, ati ṣe awọn yiyan alaye.

explore.subtitle: Ṣe afẹri awọn ọja aṣa, awọn ẹka olokiki, ati ṣe alabapin si akoyawo ounjẹ!
explore.trending_products_desc: Wo iru awọn ọja ti wa ni wiwo ati ṣatunkọ pupọ julọ ni bayi.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Ṣawakiri awọn ẹka ounjẹ olokiki julọ ninu aaye data wa.
explore.recently_added_desc: Ṣayẹwo awọn ọja tuntun ti a ṣafikun nipasẹ agbegbe.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Ṣe iranlọwọ ilọsiwaju Awọn Otitọ Ounjẹ Ṣii nipasẹ fifikun tabi ṣatunkọ awọn ọja, tabi dahun awọn ibeere.
explore.random_product_desc: Rilara orire? Ṣawari ọja laileto lati ibi ipamọ data wa.
explore.learn_more_desc: Wa bi Ṣii Awọn Otitọ Ounje n ṣiṣẹ ati bii o ṣe le ṣe iranlọwọ.
